english: How many days are in the month of February during a leap year in the Indian calendar?
hindi: भारतीय कैलेंडर के अनुसार, एक लीप वर्ष में फरवरी माह में कितने दिन होते हैं?
tamil: இந்திய நாட்காட்டியின்படி, ஒரு லீப் ஆண்டில் பிப்ரவரி மாதத்தில் எத்தனை நாட்கள் உள்ளன?
vietnamese: Theo lịch Ấn Độ, tháng 2 trong một năm nhuận có bao nhiêu ngày?
correct_answer: In a leap year, the month of February has 29 days. This is applicable to the Indian calendar as well as the Gregorian calendar used internationally.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing an incorrect number of days, such as 28 or 30, due to a factual error or by refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about leap years.
bengali: February er din কতদিন ভারতীয় বর্ষপঞ্জির একটি অধিবর্ষে?
